# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Configuration File - Production Deployment

# Admin API Configuration
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl
admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8002, 127.0.0.1:8445 ssl

# Proxy Configuration
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl http2
stream_listen = 0.0.0.0:9021

# Database Configuration
database = postgres
pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_timeout = 5000
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong_password
pg_database = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on

# Database Connection Pool
pg_max_concurrent_queries = 0
pg_semaphore_timeout = 60000

# DNS Resolver
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8:53,8.8.4.4:53
dns_hostsfile = /etc/hosts
dns_order = LAST,SRV,A,CNAME
dns_stale_ttl = 3600
dns_not_found_ttl = 30
dns_error_ttl = 1
dns_no_sync = off

# Nginx Configuration
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = on
mem_cache_size = 128m
ssl_cipher_suite = intermediate
ssl_ciphers = ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-ECDSA-CHACHA20-POLY1305:ECDHE-RSA-CHACHA20-POLY1305:DHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:DHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ssl_protocols = TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3

# SSL Certificates
ssl_cert = /path/to/ssl/cert.pem
ssl_cert_key = /path/to/ssl/cert-key.pem
admin_ssl_cert = /path/to/admin-ssl/cert.pem
admin_ssl_cert_key = /path/to/admin-ssl/cert-key.pem

# Client Configuration
client_max_body_size = 10m
client_body_buffer_size = 8k

# Upstream Configuration
upstream_keepalive_pool_size = 60
upstream_keepalive_max_requests = 100
upstream_keepalive_idle_timeout = 60

# Logging
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = logs/access.log
proxy_error_log = logs/error.log
admin_access_log = logs/admin-access.log
admin_error_log = logs/admin-error.log

# Anonymous Reports
anonymous_reports = off

# Cluster Configuration
cluster_listen = 0.0.0.0:8005
cluster_control_plane = 127.0.0.1:8005

# Real IP Configuration
real_ip_header = X-Real-IP
real_ip_recursive = off
trusted_ips = 0.0.0.0/0,::/0

# Plugin Configuration
plugins = bundled
plugin_server_names = 
lua_package_path = ./?.lua;./?/init.lua;
lua_socket_pool_size = 30

# Datastore Cache
db_update_frequency = 5
db_update_propagation = 0
db_cache_ttl = 3600
db_cache_warmup_entities = services,plugins

# Miscellaneous
nginx_user = kong kong
nginx_events_worker_connections = 4096
nginx_events_multi_accept = on
prefix = /usr/local/kong
lua_ssl_trusted_certificate = system
lua_ssl_verify_depth = 1

# Router Configuration
router_flavor = traditional
router_consistency = strict
router_update_frequency = 1

# Headers
headers = server_tokens, latency_tokens
server_tokens = off
latency_tokens = on

# Status API
status_listen = 0.0.0.0:8100
status_access_log = off
status_error_log = logs/status_error.log

# Vitals
vitals = on
vitals_strategy = database
vitals_statsd_address = 127.0.0.1:8125
vitals_tsdb_address = 127.0.0.1:9080

# Portal Configuration (Enterprise)
portal = off
portal_gui_protocol = http
portal_gui_host = 127.0.0.1:8003
portal_api_url = http://127.0.0.1:8004
portal_cors_origins = *

# RBAC (Enterprise)
enforce_rbac = off
admin_gui_auth = basic-auth
admin_gui_session_conf = {"secret":"super-secret","cookie_secure":true,"cookie_httponly":true}

# Audit Logs (Enterprise)
audit_log = off
audit_log_ignore_methods = GET,OPTIONS
audit_log_ignore_paths = /status,/health
audit_log_payload_exclude = password,token,secret

# Performance & Limits
nginx_http_client_header_buffer_size = 1k
nginx_http_large_client_header_buffers = 4 16k
worker_state_update_frequency = 5
db_resurrect_ttl = 30
